name: Motion
description: Motion is an AI-powered productivity application that combines calendar management, task planning, project management, and documentation. It automatically prioritizes tasks, optimizes schedules through time-blocking, and integrates with over 100 tools including Gmail, Slack, Zoom, and Salesforce. The platform includes features for meeting notes, document management, and team collaboration with built-in AI assistance.
hostingDescription: Classified as SaaS: end-user productivity application hosted on Google Cloud Platform (US Central-1 region)
pricingType: Per-user subscription pricing: Pro AI at $19/seat/month (annual) or $29/seat/month (monthly), Business AI at $29/seat/month (annual) or $49/seat/month (monthly)
